---
title: "Jennifer Magnuson"
pagetitle: "Jennifer Magnuson"
first-name: "Jennifer"
last-name: "Magnuson"
credentials: "PhD, CCC-SLP"
position: "Postdoctoral Research Fellow"
affiliation: "University of Maryland, College Park"
pronouns: "she/her"
orcid: "0000-0002-7995-6077"
date-joined: "2024-02-01"
order: 7
categories:
  - "Collaborator"
  - "Social Media Team Lead"
description-research: "Jennifer Magnuson, PhD, CCC-SLP is a Postdoctoral Research Fellow in the Language, Experience, and Development (LEAD) lab at the University of Maryland, College Park. Her broad interests include language development, early language experiences, caregiver-infant interactions, caregiver stress, and interventions to support infants who are at increased likelihood for neurodevelopmental conditions. Jennifer is passionate about increasing awareness of open science practices and is thrilled to be on the CSDisseminate team!"
headshot: "../_headshots/Jennifer Markfeld.jpg"
lightbox: false
draft: false
layout: article
title-block-categories: false
aliases:
  - /Team/Jennifer-Markfeld, jennifer-markfeld/
editor: source
---

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![{{< meta title >}}, {{< meta credentials >}}<br>{{< meta position >}}<br>{{< meta affiliation >}}](../_headshots/Jennifer Markfeld.jpg)
:::
::: {.column width="5%"}
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
{{< meta description-research >}}

:::
::::::
